items.definition_en: A pulse oximeter is a device used to measure the oxygen level in the blood.
items.example_en: The nurse placed a pulse oximeter on my finger to check my oxygen saturation.

items.definition_en: A defibrillator is a machine used to restart the heart by sending an electric shock.
items.example_en: The hospital has a defibrillator in every ward for emergencies.

items.definition_en: A wheelchair ramp is a sloped surface allowing access for wheelchairs.
items.example_en: The clinic installed a wheelchair ramp for easier access.

items.definition_en: An IV pole is a stand used to hold bags for intravenous fluids.
items.example_en: The IV pole kept my medicine bag hanging during treatment.

items.definition_en: A hearing aid is a small device worn to help people hear better.
items.example_en: My grandfather wears a hearing aid in his right ear.

items.definition_en: A surgical mask is a protective mask worn by medical staff during procedures.
items.example_en: Doctors put on a surgical mask before every operation.

items.definition_en: An orthopedic brace is a support used to hold a limb or joint in place.
items.example_en: She wore an orthopedic brace after spraining her knee.

items.definition_en: A hospital bed is a special adjustable bed for patients in hospitals.
items.example_en: The hospital bed could be raised to help the patient sit up.

items.definition_en: An ECG machine records the electrical activity of the heart.
items.example_en: The doctor used an ECG machine to monitor my heartbeat.

items.definition_en: A gurney is a wheeled stretcher used to move patients.
items.example_en: Paramedics rushed the patient into the hospital on a gurney.

items.definition_en: A dialysis machine removes waste from the blood for people with kidney failure.
items.example_en: He visits the clinic three times a week to use the dialysis machine.

items.definition_en: A fetal monitor checks a baby's heart rate during pregnancy or labor.
items.example_en: The nurse connected the expectant mother to a fetal monitor.

items.definition_en: Surgical forceps are tools used to hold or grab tissues during surgery.
items.example_en: The surgeon used surgical forceps to remove the foreign object.

items.definition_en: A nebulizer is a device that turns medicine into a mist for inhalation.
items.example_en: My son uses a nebulizer when he has trouble breathing.

items.definition_en: A catheter is a tube used to drain fluids from or deliver fluids to the body.
items.example_en: The patient needed a catheter during surgery.

items.definition_en: A tongue depressor is a flat stick used to press down the tongue for examination.
items.example_en: The doctor used a tongue depressor to check my throat.

items.definition_en: A hospital gown is a loose garment worn by patients in hospitals.
items.example_en: Patients change into a hospital gown before a medical exam.

items.definition_en: A medical chart is a record of a patient’s health history and care.
items.example_en: The nurse updated my medical chart after each visit.

items.definition_en: A medical ventilator is a machine that helps a patient breathe.
items.example_en: The medical ventilator kept the patient alive during his illness.

items.definition_en: An infusion pump is a device that delivers fluids into a patient’s body in controlled amounts.
items.example_en: The nurse programmed the infusion pump for my medication.
